steps.t: Munfaeril's shrine lies to the north of Barnavon. You should place Munfaeril's sigil upon her shrine and perform the ritual to call upon her aid.
Munfaeril is at her shrine, north of Barnavon. You should speak with Munfaeril through the shrine regarding the evils committed by the brenin of Barna…
Munfaeril is at her shrine, north of Barnavon. You should speak with Munfaeril when you are ready to depart for Barnavon. <rgb=#FF0000>This inst…
Munfaeril is at her shrine, north of Barnavon. You should return to Munfaeril and tell her of the events at Barnavon.
